title: Chat Binds
description: Bind chat messages and commands to a key
body:
![Bind creation screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lyzGZZ6G/images/676a26a212d54a24079fb623904db665ac2f137e.png)
![Bind management menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lyzGZZ6G/images/6d3ae4b596c3f9f7d6c7c55bce931e21d9e2eb2e.png)

ChatBinds is a mod for binding chat messages and commands to a key.  
By default, the menu to list binds and add binds isn't bound to any key, you will need to bind one of these to use this mod.  
The bindings are registered as regular keybinds, allowing them to be used in mods like TooManyBinds or rebound in the vanilla keybind settings.
